GIRA_HORARIO

However, from there I cannot directly reach the goal because of lava (`L`) cells nearby. I need to move around the lava to reach the goal. The best option is to move forward to row 02 column B to have more options to navigate around the lava.

FRENTE

</thought>

GIRA_HORARIO
